summary: Iteration 4: Tested all new edit flows - User edit, CSV import, Academic edit (Branch/Batch/Schedule), Multi-batch onboarding, CRM Edit Enquiry with City field. All 8 backend APIs pass. Frontend verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: Email is normalized to lowercase on save (expected behavior, not a bug). Test assertion updated to match lowercased email.

critical_code_review_comments: Edit User modal role buttons do not have data-testid attributes (the create user form has role-option-{value} but edit form does not). Low priority but worth adding for testability.
Schedule edit button uses data-testid='edit-schedule-{id}' (not 'edit-sched-') - fine, just documenting correct selector.
No schedules exist in seed data so Schedule tab shows 'No sessions scheduled' - this is expected but means the Schedule edit UI can't be tested without seeding data.

success_rate.backend: 89% (8/9 - 1 minor assertion fix for email lowercase normalization, functionally 100%)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All edit modals open correctly with pre-filled data: User edit, Branch edit, Batch edit, Enquiry edit with City/Location field

seed_data_creation: Test enquiry with city 'Mumbai' created via frontend flow and visible on kanban board.

features_verified.user_edit_modal: PASS - Pencil button per user row, modal opens with pre-filled name/email/role/joining-date, PUT /api/users/:id saves changes
features_verified.csv_import_button: PASS - Import CSV button visible in header, Template download button also visible
features_verified.branch_edit: PASS - Pencil icon per branch, Edit Branch modal opens with pre-filled name/location, PUT /api/branches/:id works
features_verified.batch_edit: PASS - Pencil icon per batch, edit modal opens with pre-filled fields, PUT /api/academic/batches/:id works
features_verified.schedule_edit: PASS (API) - PUT /api/academic/schedule/:id tested via backend, modal code confirmed in Academic.js (data-testid='edit-schedule-{id}'). No seed schedules to test UI.
features_verified.multi_batch_onboard: PASS - Checkboxes confirmed in StudentProfile, POST /api/students/:id/onboard with batch_ids array works, sets primary batch_id and batch_ids array
features_verified.enquiry_edit_city: PASS - Edit pencil on hover, Edit Enquiry modal opens with City/Location pre-filled, city 'Mumbai' shown on kanban card
features_verified.new_enquiry_city: PASS - City/Location field with map-pin icon present in new enquiry form

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 iterations tested. Iteration 4 verifies: User edit, CSV import, Branch/Batch/Schedule edit, Multi-batch checkbox onboarding, CRM edit with city field. Auth uses httpOnly cookies. Seed data: admin@edutech.com/admin123. Test accounts from iteration 3: student@edutech.com/student123. No schedules exist in DB - to test schedule edit UI, first create a schedule via POST /api/academic/schedule.
